name: Stalled Draft Escalation
description: Monitors Airtable drafts that remain in Draft status beyond SLA thresholds (24h warning, 48h escalation, 72h critical) and alerts CEO.

config.description: Classify each stalled record by severity
config.code: const records = [...inputData.content_records, ...inputData.video_records, ...inputData.podcast_records]; const now = Date.now(); const classified = records.map(r => { const hours = (now - new Date(r.created).getTime()) / 3600000; let severity = 'warning'; if (hours > 72) severity = 'critical'; else if (hours > 48) severity = 'escalation'; return { ...r, hours_stalled: Math.round(hours), severity }; }); output = { stalled_records: classified, total: classified.length, critical: classified.filter(r => r.severity === 'critical').length };

config.message: Draft SLA Monitor | {{step4.total}} stalled records | {{step4.critical}} critical
